# FIXTURE — synthetic Hawaiian-flavored verse text for adapter tests only.
# NOT real Bible content. Exercises NFC normalization, ʻokina canonicalization
# (U+02BB), kahakō (precomposed long vowels), and verse-id alignment with the
# matching English fixture file. See data-sources/bible/README.md (issue #16).
#
# Format: <verse_no>: <text>
1: He hōʻailona kēia no ka hoʻāʻo ʻana o ka mea kākau.
2: ʻO ka ʻōlelo Hawaiʻi he ʻōlelo nani.
3: Ua hōʻike ʻia kēia ma ka palapala hoʻāʻo.
4: He pōkole nā paukū a pau o ka palapala nei.
5: ʻO ka hopena, ua pau ka hoʻāʻo ʻana.
